content.en:
Cangshan Makoku.

This is a small true country, there are not many living beings, most of them are some indigenous biological races, and the one in charge of the Cangshan True Kingdom is a fourfold heavenly force - Cangshan Sect.

The Cangshan Sect found a resource-poor area in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, divided an area, opened up a true country, and developed its power here, although it was difficult to recruit any geniuses, but it was okay to mix.

But today, the Cangshan Sect and the Cangshan True Kingdom have ushered in the end.

Bang!!!!

The void was squeezed open, and a huge forbidden treasure land seemed to come out of thin air, and the sudden birth crushed the Cangshan True Kingdom, as if the entire True Kingdom was covered by this forbidden treasure land.

The impact of this was that the true kingdom of Cangshan was shattered, and countless living beings were devoured and died by the power of the dark and forbidden powers.

And the Dao Ancestors of the Cangshan Sect were forced to awaken and emerge one by one, but before they could enjoy the benefits of the Forbidden Treasure Land, a large number of True Ancestors poured into this Forbidden Treasure Land and clashed with the Dao Ancestors of the Cangshan Sect.

The Dao Ancestors were born with a strength that could not be brought into play, and the strongest Dao Ancestor of the Cangshan Sect was also the Quadruple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, so they were quickly destroyed by a large number of True Ancestors.

Strictly speaking, the destruction of the Cangshan Sect was purely out of greed, and if they didn't try to snatch the resources of this large forbidden treasure land, they wouldn't all fall.

And the news of this large-scale forbidden treasure land also quickly spread throughout the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and countless forces heard the news and rushed to it as quickly as possible.

-----------

Tianhai Sect.

When Hebo True Ancestor heard the news of the large-scale Forbidden Treasure Land, he was immediately very excited, and after reporting it to the Dao Ancestors, he led a large number of True Ancestors to rush to the Forbidden Treasure Land.

Mitian Sect, Ten Thousand Domains Temple, Heavenly Sword Sect, King Kong City, Heavenly Sword Gate...... One by one, the Upper Triple Heaven forces went to the large forbidden treasure land.

This large forbidden treasure land is similar to a magma world, so it is also called the Huoyan Forbidden Land!

Black Wind Mountain.

Ye Tian led many generals such as the Blood Demon General, the Ferris General, and the Fengxing General as the Nine Extremes Heavenly General, and a large number of peak masters descended on the Huoyan Forbidden Land, and some generals even went over with their own legions.

In this regard, Ye Tian did not dissuade him.

Even if he said it, these generals and peak masters might not necessarily listen, and besides, if someone was lucky and really got an amazing opportunity, wouldn't he dissuade others from destroying others' chances.

So, he didn't interfere with anything, and whoever wanted to go went.

Huoyan tabooly.

Ye Tian and many True Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain came here and entered it without the slightest hesitation.

The Huoyan Forbidden Land is full of magma land, and the air is also filled with a rich dark forbidden power, and it is very violent, completely different from the gentle dark forbidden power of other forbidden lands.

If you don't have enough strength, I'm afraid that if you enter this forbidden place of fire, you will die on the spot.

And.

Rumble!!!!

A magma monster the size of a majestic mountain came out of the magma field, and a large magma hand slapped at the many True Ancestors.

"Die!"

The Bloody General struck a shot, piercing the magma monster with a single shot, killing it in an instant.

However, the strength of this magma monster is not weak, and it also belongs to the forbidden bloodline creature, and it has about the strength of a top true ancestor.

Ye Tian used his copying talent to probe it, and found that there were many magma monsters in the magma field, and they basically had the combat power of the top true ancestor, if a single top true ancestor was attacked by a magma monster, the other party had a local combat advantage, and it would really suffer, and if he was accidentally surrounded by multiple magma monsters, he was afraid that there would be a danger of falling.

"Part!"

Ye Tian said.

In such a forbidden treasure land, collective action is indeed safer, but the harvest is not well distributed, and there is no time to allocate when grabbing treasures at critical moments!

Therefore, it is best to find the forbidden treasures separately.

Of course.

The many True Ancestors of the Black Wind Mountain have contact with each other, and if they encounter danger, they can save it, and if they can't save it, there is no way.

Ye Tian acted alone, looking for forbidden and strange objects.

Large forbidden treasures will have a large number of forbidden treasures, as well as at least ten or more forbidden treasures, if you find a forbidden treasure, it will make a lot of money.

Of course, finding the Forbidden Treasure will unexpectedly become the target of others once it is discovered.

The large forbidden treasure land is very large, from the outside world, it is comparable to the size of a small true country, and the interior is comparable to a large true country, not less than the size of the Void Heaven True Country, can you imagine how many resources and treasures such a huge forbidden treasure land contains?

It can be said that the value of a large forbidden treasure land is far beyond the imagination of a Upper Triple Heaven force.

One! two! three......

Ye Tian found more than thirty forbidden strange things in just a few days, as if forbidden strange things were very common here, and he also found several high-level forbidden strange things.

Not only did Ye Tian find many forbidden and strange things, but other True Ancestors also found a lot of forbidden and strange things, so you can imagine how many forbidden and strange things there are here.

All the True Ancestors were crazy, and almost all the top True Ancestors in the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm came.

And inside the forbidden land of Huoyan, fighting is also everywhere.

I don't know how many True Ancestors kill people in order to snatch forbidden strange things, after all, killing one True Ancestor may obtain several or more forbidden strange things.

The Xeon True Ancestor kills the top True Ancestor, the Invincible True Ancestor kills the Xeon True Ancestor, and multiple Invincible True Ancestors besiege and kill an Invincible True Ancestor......

It's too chaotic here, so to speak.

And Ye Tian knew very well that this was just the beginning!

Finally, on the sixth day, the first Forbidden Arcana was born.

---------------

The Forbidden Land of Huoyan, an area of magma volcanoes.

The three Supreme True Ancestors found a black-red fire lotus here, and one after another forbidden rules surrounded it, and the rich forbidden origin escaped, turning this area into a cultivation treasure land.

The birth of the forbidden origin is the characteristic of the forbidden treasure, so this fire lotus is a forbidden treasure, and it is also a forbidden treasure containing the forbidden origin of fire, which is very precious to the Dao ancestors who walk the avenue of fire.

Whatever its specific purpose, a forbidden treasure is enough to drive anyone crazy.

And so.

These three Supreme True Ancestors fought each other just to snatch this forbidden treasure.

And soon, the news leaked out.

Suddenly, Huo Yan forbadly rushed over with a large number of True Ancestors.

Huoyan is forbidden outside the ground.

The figures of Dao Ancestors emerged one by one, and these Dao Ancestors finally couldn't help it.

Among them, there are many Five-Fold Heavenly and Six-Fold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and there are many Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, and even the Eightfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors are here.

Rumble!!!!

The Dao Ancestors descended outside the Huoyan Forbidden Land one after another, and at this time, many Dao Ancestors obviously sensed that the rule suppression of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm had weakened a lot, and their strength might still be difficult to exert, but they could at least maintain the Huoyan Forbidden Land for a long time without weakening their strength.

For example, once a supreme Dao Ancestor was born before, if he did not return to sleep for half a day, his strength would drop very seriously, but now it is difficult to greatly attenuate his strength even for a year.

All of a sudden, many Dao Ancestors were excited.

Some of the weaker Dao Ancestors didn't dare to compete for the Forbidden Treasure anymore, it was the battlefield of the Supreme Dao Ancestors, and they set their sights on other treasures.

For example, some high-level taboo strange things and top-level forbidden strange things are also very valuable.

And when the Dao Ancestors saw the true ancestors of other forces, they took action directly without saying a word.

In this way, many True Ancestors who were not strong were miserable, and they were intercepted and killed by the Dao Ancestors one by one.

Of course, there were also Dao Ancestors who were killed by the True Ancestors, but that was a minority after all.

Forbidden Fire Lotus Birthplace.

The three Supreme True Ancestors had not yet decided the winner, and one after another Invincible True Ancestors were the first to descend here, killing the three Supreme Dao Ancestors in an instant.

But before these invincible true ancestors snatched the forbidden fire lotus, the forbidden treasure, the strongest Dao ancestors arrived.

As a result, these invincible true ancestors quickly retreated, not daring to participate, otherwise any supreme Dao ancestor would have the strength to kill them.

Of course, these supreme Dao ancestors are also the sect elders of these invincible true ancestors, and the goal of these supreme Dao ancestors is the forbidden treasure, so they will not kill those invincible true ancestors who are watching.

Tianhai Sect, Mitian Sect, Ten Thousand Domains Temple, Black Wind Mountain...... The supreme Dao ancestors of one by one forces are here.

The Fire King of Black Wind Mountain longed for this forbidden fire lotus the most, and his eyes were full of greed.

"Wind King, you have to help me, this forbidden fire lotus has helped me a lot, I have a feeling that it can help me advance to the Invincible Dao Ancestor realm!"

The Fire King spoke.

"It's certain to help you, but don't expect too much, if it was really that simple to be promoted to Invincible Dao Ancestor, I would have been promoted a long time ago!"

The Wind King responded.

"Anyway, it's a hope, I have to fight for it!" said the Fire King, gritting his teeth.

His talent is not as good as that of the Wind King, his strength is not as good as the Wind King, and his luck is not as good as the Wind King.

If he lost this opportunity this time, he really didn't know if there was any hope of being promoted to Invincible Dao Ancestor.

Therefore, in order to compete for this forbidden fire lotus, he must do whatever it takes, even if it is this time to cast the forbidden technique!
